reference_dataset: Coordinated turn nonlinear SSM, Sarkka 2013 ch.5 / Yaghoobi et al. 2021 (arXiv:2102.00514) §5 setup
algorithm_description: quasi-DEER (diagonal-Jacobian Newton iterations + jax.lax.associative_scan); re-implemented from lindermanlab/elk
sequential_reference: jax.lax.scan over the same transition_fn (NOT EKF); ELK and lax.scan both solve y[t]=f(y[t-1]) — ELK in O(K log T), lax.scan in O(T).
K_note: Coordinated-turn has strong contraction (linear transition near omega=0); K expected 3-5. HGF K=8-15 prediction still stands (weakly contracting, transient sr>=1). These are different systems.
par_wall_note: Python loop over Newton iterations; par_wall includes jax.vmap/jacfwd overhead but NOT compilation time.
speedup_note: CPU-only; speedup expected < 1 on CPU per 25-RESEARCH.md §7b. GPU speedup informational; see cluster SLURM script.
verdict_note: PASS: rel_err < 1e-5 (quasi-ELK matches lax.scan) and K <= 15. GPU speedup is informational (not gating).
platform_note: CPU-only run (local Windows 11 machine). GPU run submitted via SLURM (see cluster/25_reproduce_reference_gpu.slurm). M3 cluster status: Phase 14.1-03 stale pip install issue pending (job 54934145 failed with ModuleNotFoundError:prl_hgf); see STATE.md.
